name: @platform/artifactgraph
description: Local MCP: analyze marks/registry/gaps + allowlisted codegen for platform-bases

scripts.init:portal: node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project portal && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs rebuild --project portal
scripts.init:all: node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project portal && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project nextjs && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project nuxt-nest && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project next-nest && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project fast-api-base && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project api && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project integration && node bin/artifactgraph.mjs init --project line
